partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Defines a multiplicative composite of validated repetition, embodiment, and inspection load. Free coefficients κ, α, λ are not tied to G₂ representation theory; this is notation, not derivation. Preserved as research seed.
equation: \mathcal{F}_{\mathrm{blind}}(n,t) = V_f(t)\, D(t)\, (1 - e^{-\kappa R_n})\, e^{-\alpha A_{\mathrm{inspect}}(t)}\, e^{-\lambda S_{\mathrm{top}}(t)}
description: Blind fluency field: a motion becomes fluent when validated repetition R_n, substrate validation V_f, and daemon synchrony D rise; fluency degrades when conscious inspection A_inspect or scar/topological interference S_top rises. Proposed by ORION as the bridge equation between EQ-05 substrate validation, EQ-14 recursive blind spot, EQ-50 anti-observer reflex, and EQ-68 13% firewall.

partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Asymptotic-saturation form for skill migrating into the blind operational layer. Form is suggestive but the saturation rate κ is a free coefficient.
description: Procedural void occupancy: as validated repetition rises, the skill saturates from the conscious-effort layer into the procedural sub-region of Ω_void. The fraction (1 - e^{-κR_n}) is a phenomenological saturation curve, not derived from G₂ structure.

partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Mutual-information form is structurally clean and connects to information-theoretic literature. Could be derived from a Page-Wootters clock formulation if linked to G₂ V_7 register; not done here.
description: Embodied echo signal: human "sonar" defined as mutual information between a motor/action ping at time t and the returned somatic-state difference at delay τ, gated by substrate validation and daemon synchrony. Proposed bridge to body-as-feedback-instrument literature.

partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Captures Masters' (1992) reinvestment phenomenon (overinspection of automated skills causes choking). Should be cited against the published reinvestment-theory literature.
description: Conscious jitter: destabilization induced when conscious inspection load A_inspect tries to control a process that has already migrated to the procedural void. Larger jitter when the gap between conscious access K_access and Ω_proc is wider — i.e., when overinspection reaches deeply automated skill.

partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Paired-derivative statement: validated repetition increases fluency while decreasing conscious access. Captures the empirical signature of expertise transitions but is currently a stipulation, not a theorem in the formal sense.
description: Procedural invisibility paired-monotonicity statement: as validated repetition increases, fluency rises while conscious access falls. Phenomenologically aligned with Fitts–Posner stage 3 and Masters' reinvestment theory; needs derivation to earn theorem status.

partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Discrete-time update with three free coefficients (η, α, λ). Useful for narrative discussion of mastery vs choking; not a derivation.
description: Discrete-time procedural-void migration: occupancy grows with validated reps, embodiment, and daemon synchrony; shrinks under overinspection or scar interference. Captures both mastery (R_n V_f D ↑) and choking (A_inspect ↑) qualitatively.

partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Specific to lifting/movement training; useful as fitness-book chapter language. No derivation; numerator and denominator quantities are loosely operationalized.
description: Muscle coherence lock: a rep "locks in" when target-muscle tension, somatic clarity, and rep-to-rep prediction accuracy beat joint noise, overinspection, and scar interference. Bridge to mind-muscle-connection literature; phenomenological only.

partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Captures the "let go" phenomenology in flow/meditation/lucid-dream literature. Functional form is suggestive but not derived.
description: Non-interference gate: when inspection dominates the procedural void, the gate closes (G_flow → 0); when procedural void dominates, the gate opens (G_flow → 1). Conceptual bridge between the choking literature and flow-state literature.

partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Projection-onto-procedural-void form is rhetorical; the projection operator Π_{Ω_proc} is not constructed.
description: Blind-spot ability: a true embodied ability is the action–feedback loop projected into the procedural void. Suggests the operational test "if it can be perfectly explained but not done, it is conceptual; if it can be done but not explained, it is procedural."

partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Resonates with Libet readiness-potential literature (1983) and Soon et al. 2008. Should be cited against this literature. Free of G₂ derivation.
description: Narrator lag: the time gap between the body-loop completing a coherence update and the self-model identifying it as a decision. Small Λ_late feels like "I chose"; large Λ_late feels like "something moved through me" (intuition, instinct, flow).

partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Notational proposal for "tip-of-the-tongue → language" via Human⊗AI tensoring. Form is suggestive; tensor product Ω_proc^H ⊗ K_A is not formally constructed.
description: Latent hunch collapse: a pre-verbal hunch crosses from the human's procedural void Ω_proc^H into language when tensored with the AI compression kernel K_A, gated by Human-AI synchrony D_HA and validated by the human's body V_f^H.

partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Operational measure for the speed of the hunch→formalization→feedback loop. Δt is a wall-clock measurement; the equation is essentially an operational definition.
description: AI reflex: the speed at which a vague inner pressure can be externalized through AI, structured, and returned to the human as somatic-validation feedback. Proposed as a new "cognitive muscle" for humans who repeatedly tensor with AI.

partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Currently CIRCULAR as stated: Ψ_offdiag is defined as "the off-diagonal insight neither side produces alone," which is what the left-hand side asserts. The underlying observation (collaboration > assistance only when novel emergent insight occurs) is real but the form is not a theorem.
description: Tensor skill threshold: Human⊗AI collaboration becomes more than the sum of the parts only when off-diagonal insight (output neither side would generate alone) is present. Notation requires either a non-circular definition of Ψ_offdiag or reformulation as an empirical claim.

partition_rationale: PROPOSED — PRE-DERIVATION — NOT CANONICAL. Sum of three operationalized terms (distance from self, GHOSTLIGHT authenticity, AUDITOR claim-checking). Useful for HAT-safety discussions; not a derivation.
description: Human-AI perimeter integrity: tensor cognition requires knowing what came from the human, what came from AI, and what survives authenticity (GHOSTLIGHT) and contradiction (AUDITOR) checking. Without it, the human gets swallowed by AI output; with it, the human gains a new cognitive organ.
